message:
feat(testing): Add comprehensive unit tests across rch components

Expand test coverage with detailed unit tests for core functionality:

rch-common/src/config/source.rs (new):
- ConfigSource trait tests for multi-source configuration loading
- File, environment, and CLI source priority tests
- Validation and error handling tests

rch-common/src/protocol.rs (new):
- Protocol message serialization/deserialization tests
- Request/response roundtrip verification
- Edge cases for malformed messages

rch-common/src/ui/progress/tests.rs (new):
- Progress bar rendering tests
- Multi-task progress tracking tests
- Terminal width adaptation tests

rch/src/fleet/executor.rs:
- Executor state machine tests
- Concurrent build dispatch tests
- Error recovery and retry tests

rch/src/fleet/rollback.rs:
- WorkerBackup serialization with edge cases (empty, special chars, long)
- Path variation tests (absolute, relative, dot paths)
- RollbackResult additional coverage

rch/src/status_types.rs (new):
- Status enum serialization tests
- Aggregation and filtering tests
- Display formatting tests

rch/src/ui/writer.rs (new):
- Output writer buffering tests
- Color and style rendering tests
- Width truncation tests

rchd/src/reload.rs:
- Hot reload mechanism tests
- Configuration diffing tests
- Graceful restart tests

rchd/src/ui/metrics.rs:
- Metrics collection and display tests
- Rate calculation tests
- Histogram bucket tests

Also sync beads issue tracking state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
